g.text: Linux Control Groups: Hierarchy Comparison (Implementation Spec)

ul.li: All memory offsets are relative to the controller struct base.
V2 uses cgroup.procs instead of tasks for thread-group atomic management.

ol.li: Siloed Controllers: Each resource (CPU, Mem) manages its own independent tree.
N:M Complexity: A process may reside in /memory/groupA and /cpu/groupB simultaneously.
Inconsistent States: Coordination overhead between OOM kills and PID limits.
Unified Hierarchy: One directory structure for all resource controllers.
No-Internal-Process Rule: Processes only reside in leaf nodes.
Atomic Transitions: Simplified process migration across nodes.
